mapper.select:
SELECT pe.SLOT_NUMBER, -- 엔트리 슬롯 번호
op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, op.USER_ID, op.CURRENT_ATTACK, op.CURRENT_DEFENSE, op.CURRENT_MACRO, op.CURRENT_MICRO, op.CURRENT_LUCK, op.ACQUIRED_AT, op.CURRENT_RARITY,
p.PLAYER_SEQ, p.PLAYER_NAME, p.RACE, p.RARITY AS "baseRarity", p.PLAYER_IMG_URL, p.PLAYER_COST,
pack.PACK_NAME -- (★★) [수정 1] 팩 이름(PACK_NAME) 컬럼 추가 FROM TBL_PVE_ENTRY pe -- (기준) PVE 엔트리 JOIN TBL_OWNED_PLAYERS op ON pe.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ -- 보유 선수 JOIN TBL_PLAYERS p ON op.PLAYER_SEQ = p.PLAYER_SEQ -- 선수 마스터 LEFT JOIN TBL_PACKS pack ON op.ACQUIRED_FROM_PACK_SEQ = pack.PACK_SEQ -- (★★) [수정 2] 올바른 JOIN 구문 WHERE pe.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY pe.SLOT_NUMBER ASC -- 슬롯 번호 순서대로 정렬
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PVE_ENTRY ( PVE_ENTRY_SEQ, USER_ID, OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, SLOT_NUMBER ) VALUES ( SEQ_PVE_ENTRY.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{ownedPlayerSeq}, #{slotNumber} )
